name: itx-main-orchestrator
definition: {"Comment":"ITX Main Orchestrator - Pipeline de Interchange (Transform + Extract + Clean + Calculate + Interchange) - v6 PySpark","StartAt":"Transform","States":{"Transform":{"Type":"Task","Comment":"Ejecuta TODOS los transforms (BASEII + SMS + VSS) - Paso 1","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"itx-transform","Payload.$":"$"},"ResultPath":"$.transform_result","ResultSelector":{"status.$":"$.Payload.status","total_outputs.$":"$.Payload.total_outputs","total_records.$":"$.Payload.total_records","outputs.$":"$.Payload.outputs","client_id.$":"$.Payload.client_id","file_id.$":"$.Payload.file_id","brand.$":"$.Payload.brand","file_type.$":"$.Payload.file_type","file_date.$":"$.Payload.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.Payload.content_hash"},"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.TooManyRequestsException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":3,"BackoffRate":2}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"HandleTransformException","ResultPath":"$.error"}],"Next":"CheckTransformResult"},"CheckTransformResult":{"Type":"Choice","Comment":"Verifica si Transform generó outputs válidos","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.transform_result.status","StringEquals":"ERROR","Next":"TransformFailed"},{"Variable":"$.transform_result.total_outputs","NumericEquals":0,"Next":"NoDataToProcess"}],"Default":"PrepareExtractInput"},"HandleTransformException":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Normaliza el estado cuando Transform lanza excepción","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"TRANSFORM","message":"Transform phase threw an exception","error.$":"$.error","file_id.$":"$.file_id","client_id.$":"$.client_id","brand.$":"$.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.failure_info","Next":"UpdateStatusFailed"},"TransformFailed":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Transform retornó ERROR","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"TRANSFORM","message":"Transform phase returned ERROR status","file_id.$":"$.transform_result.file_id","client_id.$":"$.transform_result.client_id","brand.$":"$.transform_result.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.failure_info","Next":"UpdateStatusFailed"},"NoDataToProcess":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"No se encontraron registros","Parameters":{"status":"COMPLETED_NO_DATA","message":"No matching records found in file","file_id.$":"$.transform_result.file_id","client_id.$":"$.transform_result.client_id","brand.$":"$.transform_result.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.completion_info","Next":"UpdateStatusNoData"},"PrepareExtractInput":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Prepara el payload para Lambda Extract","Parameters":{"outputs.$":"$.transform_result.outputs","client_id.$":"$.transform_result.client_id","file_id.$":"$.transform_result.file_id","brand.$":"$.transform_result.brand","file_type.$":"$.transform_result.file_type","file_date.$":"$.transform_result.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.transform_result.content_hash"},"ResultPath":"$.extract_input","Next":"Extract"},"Extract":{"Type":"Task","Comment":"Extrae campos específicos de los Parquets - Paso 2","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"itx-extract","Payload.$":"$.extract_input"},"ResultPath":"$.extract_result","ResultSelector":{"status.$":"$.Payload.status","total_outputs.$":"$.Payload.total_outputs","total_records.$":"$.Payload.total_records","total_fields.$":"$.Payload.total_fields","outputs.$":"$.Payload.outputs","errors.$":"$.Payload.errors","client_id.$":"$.Payload.client_id","file_id.$":"$.Payload.file_id","brand.$":"$.Payload.brand","file_type.$":"$.Payload.file_type","file_date.$":"$.Payload.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.Payload.content_hash"},"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.TooManyRequestsException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":3,"BackoffRate":2}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"HandleExtractException","ResultPath":"$.error"}],"Next":"CheckExtractResult"},"CheckExtractResult":{"Type":"Choice","Comment":"Verifica si Extract procesó correctamente","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.extract_result.status","StringEquals":"ERROR","Next":"ExtractFailed"}],"Default":"PrepareCleanInput"},"HandleExtractException":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Normaliza el payload para Lambda y convierte tipos de datos - Paso si Clean procesó correctamente","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.clean_result.status","StringEquals":"ERROR","Next":"CleanFailed"}],"Default":"CleanSuccess"},"HandleCleanException":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Normaliza el estado cuando Clean lanza excepción","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"CLEAN","message":"Clean phase threw an el payload para Glue Job Calculate (PySpark)","Parameters":{"outputs.$":"$.clean_result.outputs","client_id.$":"$.clean_result.client_id","file_id.$":"$.clean_result.file_id","brand.$":"$.clean_result.brand","file_type.$":"$.clean_result.file_type","file_date.$":"$.clean_result.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.clean_result.content_hash","staging_bucket":"itx-staging-dev","reference_bucket":"itx-reference-dev"},"ResultPath":"$.calculate_input","Next":"Calculate"},"Calculate":{"Type":"Task","Comment":"Calcula campos adicionales - Paso 4 (Glue Job PySpark)","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::glue:startJobRun.sync","Parameters":{"JobName":"itx-calculate","Arguments":{"--outputs.$":"States.JsonToString($.calculate_input.outputs)","--client_id.$":"$.calculate_input.client_id","--file_id.$":"$.calculate_input.file_id","--brand.$":"$.calculate_input.brand","--file_type.$":"$.calculate_input.file_type","--file_date.$":"$.calculate_input.file_date","--content_hash.$":"$.calculate_input.content_hash","--staging_bucket.$":"$.calculate_input.staging_bucket","--reference_bucket.$":"$.calculate_input.reference_bucket"}},"ResultPath":"$.calculate_job_result","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Glue.AWSGlueException"],"IntervalSeconds":30,"MaxAttempts":2,"BackoffRate":2},{"ErrorEquals":["Glue.ConcurrentRunsExceededException"],"IntervalSeconds":60,"MaxAttempts":10,"BackoffRate":1.5,"Comment":"Espera hasta 10 veces si Glue está ocupado con otro archivo"}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"HandleCalculateException","ResultPath":"$.error"}],"Next":"CheckCalculateResult"},"CheckCalculateResult":{"Type":"Choice","Comment":"Verifica si Calculate (Glue) procesó correctamente","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.calculate_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"FAILED","Next":"CalculateFailed"},{"Variable":"$.calculate_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"STOPPED","Next":"CalculateFailed"},{"Variable":"$.calculate_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"TIMEOUT","Next":"CalculateFailed"}],"Default":"CalculateSuccess"},"HandleCalculateException":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Normaliza el estado cuando Calculate lanza excepción","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"CALCULATE","message":"Calculate phase (Glue Job) threw an exception","error.$":"$.error","file_id.$":"$.calculate_input.file_id","client_id.$":"$.calculate_input.client_id","brand.$":"$.calculate_input.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.failure_info","Next":"UpdateStatusFailed"},"CalculateFailed":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Calculate (Glue) falló","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"CALCULATE","message":"Calculate phase (Glue Job) failed","job_run_state.$":"$.calculate_job_result.JobRunState","error_message.$":"$.calculate_job_result.ErrorMessage","file_id.$":"$.calculate_input.file_id","client_id.$":"$.calculate_input.client_id","brand.$":"$.calculate_input.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.failure_info","Next":"UpdateStatusFailed"},"CalculateSuccess":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Calculate exitoso - consolida todos los resultados y prepara para Interchange","Parameters":{"status":"CALCULATE_COMPLETED","message":"Transform, Extract, Clean and Calculate phases completed successfully","file_id.$":"$.calculate_input.file_id","client_id.$":"$.calculate_input.client_id","brand.$":"$.calculate_input.brand","file_type.$":"$.calculate_input.file_type","file_date.$":"$.calculate_input.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.calculate_input.content_hash","transform_summary.$":"$.success_info.transform_summary","extract_summary.$":"$.success_info.extract_summary","clean_summary.$":"$.success_info.clean_summary","calculate_summary":{"job_run_id.$":"$.calculate_job_result.Id","job_run_state.$":"$.calculate_job_result.JobRunState","execution_time_seconds.$":"$.calculate_job_result.ExecutionTime","workers.$":"$.calculate_job_result.NumberOfWorkers"},"transform_result_full.$":"$.success_info.transform_result_full","extract_result_full.$":"$.success_info.extract_result_full","clean_result_full.$":"$.success_info.clean_result_full","cal_outputs.$":"$.calculate_input.outputs"},"ResultPath":"$.final_success_info","Next":"PrepareInterchangeInput"},"PrepareInterchangeInput":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Prepara el payload para Glue Job Interchange (PySpark) - los outputs del Calculate tienen s3_key apuntando a 400_CAL","Parameters":{"outputs.$":"$.final_success_info.cal_outputs","client_id.$":"$.final_success_info.client_id","file_id.$":"$.final_success_info.file_id","brand.$":"$.final_success_info.brand","file_type.$":"$.final_success_info.file_type","file_date.$":"$.final_success_info.file_date","content_hash.$":"$.final_success_info.content_hash","staging_bucket":"itx-staging-dev","reference_bucket":"itx-reference-dev"},"ResultPath":"$.interchange_input","Next":"Interchange"},"Interchange":{"Type":"Task","Comment":"Asigna reglas de interchange y calcula tarifas - Paso 5 (Glue Job PySpark)","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::glue:startJobRun.sync","Parameters":{"JobName":"itx-interchange","Arguments":{"--outputs.$":"States.JsonToString($.interchange_input.outputs)","--client_id.$":"$.interchange_input.client_id","--file_id.$":"$.interchange_input.file_id","--brand.$":"$.interchange_input.brand","--file_type.$":"$.interchange_input.file_type","--file_date.$":"$.interchange_input.file_date","--content_hash.$":"$.interchange_input.content_hash","--staging_bucket.$":"$.interchange_input.staging_bucket","--reference_bucket.$":"$.interchange_input.reference_bucket"}},"ResultPath":"$.interchange_job_result","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Glue.AWSGlueException"],"IntervalSeconds":30,"MaxAttempts":2,"BackoffRate":2},{"ErrorEquals":["Glue.ConcurrentRunsExceededException"],"IntervalSeconds":60,"MaxAttempts":10,"BackoffRate":1.5,"Comment":"Espera hasta 10 veces si Glue está ocupado con otro archivo"}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"HandleInterchangeException","ResultPath":"$.error"}],"Next":"CheckInterchangeResult"},"CheckInterchangeResult":{"Type":"Choice","Comment":"Verifica si Interchange (Glue) procesó correctamente","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.interchange_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"FAILED","Next":"InterchangeFailed"},{"Variable":"$.interchange_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"STOPPED","Next":"InterchangeFailed"},{"Variable":"$.interchange_job_result.JobRunState","StringEquals":"TIMEOUT","Next":"InterchangeFailed"}],"Default":"UpdateStatusInterchangeCompleted"},"HandleInterchangeException":{"Type":"Pass","Comment":"Normaliza el estado cuando Interchange lanza excepción","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"INTERCHANGE","message":"Interchange phase (Glue Job) threw an (Glue) falló","Parameters":{"status":"FAILED","phase":"INTERCHANGE","message":"Interchange phase (Glue Job) failed","job_run_state.$":"$.interchange_job_result.JobRunState","error_message.$":"$.interchange_job_result.ErrorMessage","file_id.$":"$.interchange_input.file_id","client_id.$":"$.interchange_input.client_id","brand.$":"$.interchange_input.brand"},"ResultPath":"$.failure_info","Next":"UpdateStatusFailed"},"UpdateStatusInterchangeCompleted":{"Type":"Task","Comment":"Actualiza estado en DynamoDB a INTERCHANGE_COMPLETED","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::dynamodb:updateItem","Parameters":{"TableName":"itx-file-control","Key":{"file_id":{"S.$":"$.final_success_info.file_id"}},"UpdateExpression":"SET
